rawContent:
I now have comprehensive data. Let me compile the road conditions report:

---

# 🚗 Washington State Road Conditions Report
**As of: February 19, 2026, 6:33 AM PST**

---

## I-5 (Seattle Corridor)

### ⚠️ HIGH IMPACT ALERTS

| Location | Impact | Details |
|----------|--------|---------|
| **Ship Canal Bridge** | 🔴 HIGH | I-5 mainline reduced to **2 lanes** due to northbound bridge preservation work. Express lanes operating **northbound-only** to maintain capacity. |
| **NE 130th - Northgate Way** | 🟡 MEDIUM | Tonight (8:30pm-4am): 2 left lanes SB and 1 left lane NB closed for maintenance |
| **SR 523/NE 145th St** | 🔴 HIGH | Lane shifts and 24/7 closures on 5th, 6th, 8th Ave NE near I-5 interchange |
| **Stewart/Denny - Mercer St** | 🟢 LOW | Friday night (10pm-6am): 1 left NB lane closed for maintenance |

---

## I-90 (Snoqualmie Pass)

### ✅ PASS OPEN - No Restrictions

| Condition | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| **Temperature** | 27°F |
| **Road Surface** | Bare and wet, snow and slush in places |
| **Weather** | Overcast skies |
| **Eastbound** | No restrictions |
| **Westbound** | No restrictions |

### ⚠️ Other I-90 Alerts

| Location | Impact | Details |
|----------|--------|---------|
| **Exit 174/Hansen Rd (Moses Lake)** | 🔴 HIGH | Overpass **CLOSED** due to bridge deck/pier deterioration. No ETA for reopening. EB can still exit, WB must use Exit 169 detour. |
| **Ritzville to SR 904** | 🟢 LOW | Bare and dry, wet in places |
| **US 195 to Broadway (Spokane)** | 🟢 LOW | Bare and dry |

---

## Highway 20 (North Cascades)

### 🔴 PASS CLOSED

| Condition | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| **Status** | **CLOSED for winter** (since Dec 4, 2025) |
| **Closure** | Milepost 134 to 171 (Ross Dam Trailhead to Silver Star Gate) |
| **Reopening** | Typically late spring (late April-May) depending on conditions |

### Other SR 20 Passes

| Pass | Status | Conditions |
|------|--------|------------|
| **Loup Loup Pass** | ✅ OPEN | 17°F, compact snow/ice, light snow falling, no restrictions |
| **Wauconda Pass** | ✅ OPEN | 14°F, compact snow/ice, occasional snow flurries |
| **Sherman Pass** | ✅ OPEN | 15°F, compact snow/ice, light snow, no restrictions |

---

## SR-20 to Anacortes (San Juan Islands Ferry)

### ✅ ROUTE OPEN - Normal Operations

No active alerts affecting SR-20 from Burlington to Anacortes ferry terminal.

### 🚢 Anacortes Ferry Terminal

| Status | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Terminal** | Open with all amenities (waiting room, food service, restrooms) |
| **San Juan Islands Routes** | Operating normally |
| **Upcoming Change** | 3% card payment fee starting March 1, 2026 |

---

## ❄️ Winter Driving Reminders

- **Traction tires advised** on Stevens Pass (US 2), Mt. Baker Hwy (SR 542), Crystal-Greenwater (SR 410), White Pass (US 12)
- **Carry chains** - conditions can change rapidly
- **Check conditions before departing**: wsdot.com/travel

---

**Sources**: WSDOT Highway Alerts API, Mountain Pass Conditions API, WSF Alerts
content:
# Washington State Road Conditions Summary
**February 19, 2026**

## I-5 (Seattle Corridor)
🟡 **DELAYS** - Ship Canal Bridge reduced to 2 lanes; express lanes northbound-only. NE 145th St interchange has 24/7 lane closures.

## I-90 (Snoqualmie Pass)
✅ **CLEAR** - Pass open, no restrictions. Road bare/wet with some snow patches. 27°F.

⚠️ **CAUTION** - Exit 174 (Moses Lake) overpass closed; use Exit 169 detour.

## Highway 20 (North Cascades)
🔴 **CLOSED** - Winter closure MP 134-171. Reopens late spring.

## SR-20 Eastern Passes
✅ **CLEAR** - Loup Loup, Wauconda, Sherman passes open with compact snow/ice. No restrictions.

## SR-20 to Anacortes
✅ **CLEAR** - Normal operations to ferry terminal.

---
**Reminder:** Traction tires advised on Stevens, Mt. Baker, Crystal-Greenwater, and White passes.
